positive: Minimalist geometric forest scene featuring interlocking abstract trees and stylized woodland creatures (fox, deer, rabbit). The design must use clean, thick silhouettes against a solid complementary background (e.g., terracotta/sage green palette). Emphasis on negative space and strong black-line contrast. Composition is centered and symmetrical, suitable for looping apparel print. Flat vector illustration style, kawaii aesthetic, high contrast, graphic poster art, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, noisy, artifact, extra limbs, low detail, bad anatomy, realistic, photorealism, messy, ugly, grain
